services.title: Computer Repair
services.headline: Fix slow, crashing, or broken computers—fast.
services.summary: Diagnostics and repair for slow, crashing, overheating, or non-booting laptops and desktops, with honest repair guidance and data-safe troubleshooting.

services.title: Virus & Malware Removal
services.headline: Remove infections and secure your system.
services.summary: Malware cleanup and post-remediation hardening for pop-ups, browser hijacks, suspicious logins, and other signs a computer may be compromised.

services.title: Home Network Security & Wi-Fi Hardening
services.headline: Protect your Wi-Fi and connected devices.
services.summary: Router, Wi-Fi, and device hardening to reduce risk from weak defaults, insecure smart devices, poor segmentation, and unsafe browsing.

services.title: Wi-Fi & Network Setup
services.headline: Reliable, fast, and secure home networking.
services.summary: Router, mesh, access point, and wired network setup focused on coverage, speed, and reliability, with secure baseline configuration included.

services.title: On-Site Tech Support
services.headline: In-home help when you need it.
services.summary: House-call tech help when the issue spans computers, Wi-Fi, printers, or new devices and you want one visit to sort it out.

services.title: Scam & Fraud Protection
services.headline: Avoid scams before they cause damage.
services.summary: Practical scam prevention for households and retirees, including phishing awareness, safer device settings, and help evaluating suspicious calls, texts, and emails.

services.title: Password Management & Digital Safety
services.headline: Secure accounts with strong password practices.
services.summary: Setup and training for password managers, strong passphrases, and account protection against breaches and fraud.

services.title: Backup & Data Recovery
services.headline: Recover lost data and prevent future loss.
services.summary: Recovery of lost or deleted files when possible, plus setup of secure, automated backups to protect critical data.

services.title: Software Installation & Troubleshooting
services.headline: Fix software issues and system errors.
services.summary: Operating system installs, updates, driver fixes, and resolution of unstable or misbehaving applications.

services.title: PC & Laptop Upgrades
services.headline: Extend the life of your computer.
services.summary: Performance upgrades including SSDs, RAM, batteries, and thermal optimization to keep systems running smoothly.

services.title: Smart Home Setup & Security
services.headline: Smart technology without added risk.
services.summary: Configuration and security of smart home devices with privacy-first settings and least-privilege access.

services.title: Custom Technology Solutions
services.headline: Advanced solutions for complex needs.
services.summary: Privacy-focused consulting and specialized technology planning for projects that do not fit standard repair or support work.
